title: Petface (Seriously Strong by Petface) Dog Toy, Rubber Teething Chew Toy
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: VERSATILE TOY: Perfect for fetch, this bright and durable rubber teething chew toy will provide hours of entertainment
DURABLE MATERIAL: Made from seriously strong rubber to withstand even the most energetic play sessions
TEETHING SUPPORT: Designed to help with teething puppies, helping soothe their gums and alleviate discomfort
PET-FRIENDLY DESIGN: This Seriously Strong toy is built to last while encouraging healthy chewing habits for your furry friend

KEEPING SAFE: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘Chew’ Damage. Please supervise your pet with this toy, and examine regularly for wear and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: From the manufacturer Petface - your pets best friend - whether it's collars, leads, feeding, bedding or toys our product experts design with your pet in mind! The Petface range is of the highest quality and provides fun, innovative and interactive products to keep your pets fit, healthy and enjoying life! Shop for your favourite dog, cats and wild bird products for great value! Seriously Strong by Petface Rubber Teething Chew Toy Our Rubber Teething Chew Dog Toy is a great way for you to have fun with your pet. It helps to keep teeth and gums clean by flossing which helps prevent gum disease and plaque build-up. The toys provide a combination of durable materials to allow the dog and their owner an enjoyable shared play experience. ABOUT PETFACE All your needs are covered with the Petface range, including collars, leads, toys, feeding, coats and bedding. The designers at Petface have ensured the range has a co-ordinated look and style making sure your pets will be the ‘best dressed in town’. TREAT YOUR PAMPERED POOCH Treat your dog to their very own rubber toy, ideal for interactive play. Dogs are playful by nature; our Rubber Teething Chew Toy will give your pet hours of fun and help to keep them fit and healthy. YOU DOG'S BEST FRIEND Awesome interactive fun will be had between dog and owner as a tug of war ensues, keeping them fit and healthy. Durable and long-lasting toy suitable for medium/large active dogs.
